nodes.title: Hire Ethereum Developers to Build Your Web3 Future
nodes.description: Hire Ethereum developers from JustTry Technologies to build secure, scalable Web3 solutions that drive innovation and business growth.

faqs.question: What is the role of an Ethereum developer?
faqs.answer: An Ethereum developer builds smart contracts and decentralized applications on the Ethereum blockchain, ensuring scalability and security.

faqs.question: Which tools do Ethereum developers use?
faqs.answer: They use Solidity, Truffle, Hardhat, Ethers.js, Web3.js, and Ethereum testnets for development and testing.

faqs.question: Can an Ethereum developer integrate wallets and tokens?
faqs.answer: Yes. They handle wallet connections, ERC-20/721 token standards, and on-chain/off-chain interactions.

faqs.question: How long does it take to launch an Ethereum dApp?
faqs.answer: Development depends on complexity. Simple dApps take 2–6 weeks; complex platforms with multiple contracts may take 8–16 weeks.
